subcodes.first_line: O thou sweet gale blowing from the meads of the love of God! All human understanding and knowledge is of three categories. One is the knowledge of abstract concepts
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نفحه خوش ریاض محبت الله ادراکات و معلومات انسانیه کلیه در سه مراتب واقع
subcodes.subjects: @limits of the intellect, @symbolism, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
